sellers_note: Meet this 2023 Ford F-150 XLTa truck engineered for those who demand capability without compromise. With its powerful 5.0L V8 engine paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission and 4WD, this vehicle delivers the performance and traction you need for work and adventure. The gray exterior presents a clean, professional appearance that commands attention on any job site or street.- Power-Sliding Rear Window- SYNC 4 w/Enhanced Voice Recognition and 12'' Touchscreen- B&O Sound System by Bang & Olufsen with HD Radio- 10-Way Power Driver & Passenger Seats with Heated Front Seats- Class IV Trailer Hitch Receiver with Integrated Trailer Brake Controller- Intelligent Access with Push Button Start- Power-Adjustable Pedals- LED Box Lighting and BoxLink Bed Utility- Zone Lighting with LED Sideview Mirror Spotlights- Power Glass Heated Sideview Mirrors- Auto-Dimming Rearview Mirror- Dual Zone Electronic Automatic Temperature Control- Remote Start System with Remote Tailgate Release- SecuriCode Driver Side Keyless-Entry Keypad- 18'' 6-Spoke Machined Aluminum WheelsThis XLT comes exceptionally well-equipped with the Equipment Group 302A High, XLT Sport Appearance Package, Bed Utility Package, and Snow Plow Prep Package. The truck showcases premium details including body-color front and rear bumpers, accent-color step bars, a black 2-bar grille with chrome accents, and the versatile tailgate step with work surface. The interior combines comfort with technologyfrom the 8-inch productivity screen and SYNC 4 system to the wrapped steering wheel and sport cloth seating.The bed is fully optimized for work with LED box lighting, BoxLink secure attachment points, and premium locking cleats. The onboard 400W outlet provides convenient power for tools and equipment. With its electronic locking differential and 3.31 axle ratio, this F-150 XLT handles demanding terrain with confidence. At 39,686 miles, this truck remains in its prime with many years of service ahead.Fuel economy comes in at 16 mpg city and 22 mpg highwayrespectable figures for a truck of this capability and power. The combination of technology, comfort features, and work-ready construction makes this F-150 XLT an intelligent choice for buyers seeking a dependable full-size pickup that excels in both professional and personal applications.This is a truck built for those who work hard and expect their vehicle to keep pace. We invite you to come experience it firsthand and discover how well a properly equipped F-150 can serve your needs. YOU WILL BE SATISFIED.
